Class MainMenu

java.lang.Object
com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.MainMenu
public class MainMenu extends Object
Screen Controller class for the Main Menu screen Shows all buttons linking to other key parts of the application
Version:
8.0 April 7 2025
Author:
Neil Daya, Meer Ali, Sania Ghori
